rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks for component ports must be placed in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Implementation-level bindings should be placed in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections are defined
generic_rules: Use visible component ports in type-level contracts, avoiding implementation-only subcomponent paths
Ensure AGREE scalar types are declared with valid names: int, real, bool
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must reference visible identifiers from the component type scope
Guarantee statements should relate visible outputs to visible inputs in component type annexes
anti_patterns: Do not place AGREE contracts for component ports in implementation scopes
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type annexes unless properly represented through variables or outputs
